directionValidation.reviewNote: Four near-axis intermediate warnings were accepted after labeled normal-size and ordered-loop review confirmed the intended quadrants without reversal; all four cardinals passed three-reviewer blind validation.

continuity.reviewNote: The 157.5-to-180 diff and area outlier was visually reviewed as the natural change from a narrow three-quarter pose to the fuller front-down pose; no visible snap, scale pop, clipping, identity drift, or broken attachment was present.

visualUpgrade.metallicFinish: brushed ivory titanium, champagne gold, polished brass, and dark gunmetal recesses
visualUpgrade.eyes: deep sapphire-glass eye modules with eyelid and brow expression
visualUpgrade.halo: segmented technology ring mechanically mounted by visible yokes
visualUpgrade.coreMotion: deliberate chest-cog rotation, including a restrained powered-hover cycle
